(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

Generated df and pf:
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

-= Welcome to TextWorld, ALFRED! =-. You are in the middle of a room. Looking quickly around you, you see a armchair 1, a coffeetable 1, a drawer 7, a drawer 6, a drawer 5, a drawer 4, a drawer 3, a drawer 2, a drawer 1, a garbagecan 1, a sidetable 3, a sidetable 2, a sidetable 1, a sofa 2, a sofa 1, and a tvstand 1.
Action: go to drawer 1
You arrive at drawer 1. The drawer 1 is closed.
Action: open drawer 1
You open the drawer 1. The drawer 1 is open. In it, you see nothing.
Action: go to drawer 2
You arrive at drawer 2. The drawer 2 is closed.
Action: open drawer 2
You open the drawer 2. The drawer 2 is open. In it, you see nothing.
Action: go to sidetable 1
You arrive at sidetable 1. On the sidetable 1, you see a keychain 1, and a statue 1.

You arrive at sidetable 2. On the sidetable 2, you see nothing.

You arrive at sidetable 3. On the sidetable 3, you see a box 1.

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem alfred-problem)
  (:domain alfred)
  (:objects
    alfred - agent
    init_receptacle armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    keychain1 statue1 box1 - object
    ArmchairType DrawerType TableType GarbageCanType SofaType TVStandType CoffeeTableType SideTableType MicrowaveType SinkBasinType FridgeType - rtype
    KeychainType StatueType BoxType KnifeType ButterKnifeType - otype
  )
  (:init
    (at alfred drawer6)
    (checked drawer6)
    (opened drawer1)
    (checked drawer1)
    (not (inReceptacle keychain1 drawer1))
    (not (inReceptacle statue1 drawer1))
    (not (inReceptacle box1 drawer1))
    (opened drawer2)
    (checked drawer2)
    (not (inReceptacle keychain1 drawer2))
    (not (inReceptacle statue1 drawer2))
    (not (inReceptacle box1 drawer2))
    (opened drawer3)
    (checked drawer3)
    (not (inReceptacle keychain1 drawer3))
    (not (inReceptacle statue1 drawer3))
    (not (inReceptacle box1 drawer3))
    (opened drawer4)
    (checked drawer4)
    (not (inReceptacle keychain1 drawer4))
    (not (inReceptacle statue1 drawer4))
    (not (inReceptacle box1 drawer4))
    (checked drawer5)
    (opened drawer5)
    (not (inReceptacle keychain1 drawer5))
    (not (inReceptacle statue1 drawer5))
    (not (inReceptacle box1 drawer5))
    (checked drawer7)
    (opened drawer7)
    (not (inReceptacle keychain1 drawer7))
    (not (inReceptacle statue1 drawer7))
    (not (inReceptacle box1 drawer7))
    (checked sidetable1)
    (not (inReceptacle keychain1 sidetable1))
    (not (inReceptacle statue1 sidetable1))
    (not (inReceptacle box1 sidetable1))
    (checked sidetable2)
    (not (inReceptacle keychain1 sidetable2))
    (not (inReceptacle statue1 sidetable2))
    (not (inReceptacle box1 sidetable2))
    (checked sidetable3)
    (not (inReceptacle keychain1 sidetable3))
    (not (inReceptacle statue1 sidetable3))
    (not (inReceptacle box1 sidetable3))
    (inReceptacle keychain1 sidetable1)
    (inReceptacle statue1 sidetable1)
    (inReceptacle box1 sidetable3)
    (openable drawer1)
    (openable drawer2)
    (openable drawer3)
    (openable drawer4)
    (openable drawer5)
    (openable drawer6) (not (opened drawer6))
    (openable drawer7)
    (not (openable armchair1)) (not (openable coffeetable1)) (not (openable garbagecan1)) (not (openable sidetable1)) (not (openable sidetable2)) (not (openable sidetable3)) (not (openable sofa1)) (not (openable sofa2)) (not (openable tvstand1))
    (pickupable keychain1)
    (pickupable statue1)
    (pickupable box1)
    (receptacleType armchair1 ArmchairType)
    (receptacleType drawer1 DrawerType)
    (receptacleType drawer2 DrawerType)
    (receptacleType drawer3 DrawerType)
    (receptacleType drawer4 DrawerType)
    (receptacleType drawer5 DrawerType)
    (receptacleType drawer6 DrawerType)
    (receptacleType drawer7 DrawerType)
    (receptacleType coffeetable1 CoffeeTableType)
    (receptacleType garbagecan1 GarbageCanType)
    (receptacleType sidetable1 SideTableType)
    (receptacleType sidetable2 SideTableType)
    (receptacleType sidetable3 SideTableType)
    (receptacleType sofa1 SofaType)
    (receptacleType sofa2 SofaType)
    (receptacleType tvstand1 TVStandType)
    (objectType keychain1 KeychainType)
    (objectType statue1 StatueType)
    (objectType box1 BoxType)
    (canContain ArmchairType KeychainType)
    (canContain ArmchairType StatueType)
    (canContain ArmchairType BoxType)
    (canContain DrawerType KeychainType)
    (canContain DrawerType StatueType)
    (canContain DrawerType BoxType)
    (canContain SideTableType KeychainType)
    (canContain SideTableType StatueType)
    (canContain SideTableType BoxType)
    (= (total-cost) 0)
  )
  (:goal (opened drawer6))
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))

                (increase (total-cost) 1)

 )

                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(define (problem alfred-problem)
  (:domain alfred)

    alfred - agent

            :action GotoLocation

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

            Then, apply the object in a purposeful way — not just move it — but interact with the environment to fulfill the task’s actual goal.

            Hint: 
            1. If you want to heat, clean, and cool an object, after you go to that aim receptacle, do not put the object in the receptacle but do the action directly. For example, go to fridge, then cool the object with receptacle.
            2. If you want to slice an object, you should first go to the receptacle where both the sharp object and the aim object are located and ONLY pick up the sharp object then do the slice action. Don't forget to put the sharp object back to the receptacle after you finish slicing.
            3. If you want to examine or look at an object with a lamp, you should first go to the receptacle where the object is located and then pick it up and take the USE action of the lamp. You don't need to take the lamp but directly use it.
            4. If there are multiple actions needed to complete the task, you can break them down into smaller subgoals. For example, if you need to slice and then heat an object, first focus on slicing it, and then move on to heating it.

        In summary, the first stage is all about finding the object—this might involve going to an unvisited receptacle and opening it if necessary.
        
        Note: 
        1. some receptacles have numbers in their names. Always keep them as they are. For example, "towelholder1" should not be changed to "towelholder".
        2. Your initial goal should always be to go to a new location instead of put something into somewhere.
        3. Do not enter stage 2 when not finishing stage 1.

        Note: Always include :negative-preconditions in your :requirements whenever you use (not …) or delete effects, and never leave an :precondition or :effect block empty—either omit it or include at least one literal.

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

            :action CloseObject
            :parameters (?r - receptacle)

Remember your goal is You open the drawer 5. The drawer 5 is open. In it, you see nothing.. Based on different adjectives, you may need to perform different actions for the object in different ways.

            This may involve more than simply transferring it from one place to another.
            For example: You might examine the object or a nearby receptacle to gather information. You may need to use another tool or device (like a lamp or a switch). Some tasks require you to slice, heat, cool, or clean the object using an appropriate receptacle (e.g., microwave, sink, fridge).

            If necessary, use the PickupObject action to retrieve the item, and the GotoLocation action to move to the correct place.
            Then, apply the object in a purposeful way — not just move it — but interact with the environment to fulfill the task’s actual goal.

            Hint: 
            1. If you want to heat, clean, and cool an object, after you go to that aim receptacle, do not put the object in the receptacle but do the action directly. For example, go to fridge, then cool the object with receptacle.
            2. If you want to slice an object, you should first go to the receptacle where both the sharp object and the aim object are located and ONLY pick up the sharp object then do the slice action. Don't forget to put the sharp object back to the receptacle after you finish slicing.
            3. If you want to examine or look at an object with a lamp, you should first go to the receptacle where the object is located and then pick it up and take the USE action of the lamp. You don't need to take the lamp but directly use it.
            4. If there are multiple actions needed to complete the task, you can break them down into smaller subgoals. For example, if you need to slice and then heat an object, first focus on slicing it, and then move on to heating it.

        In summary, the first stage is all about finding the object—this might involve going to an unvisited receptacle and opening it if necessary.
        
        Note: 
        1. some receptacles have numbers in their names. Always keep them as they are. For example, "towelholder1" should not be changed to "towelholder".
        2. Your initial goal should always be to go to a new location instead of put something into somewhere.
        3. Do not enter stage 2 when not finishing stage 1.

        Note: Always include :negative-preconditions in your :requirements whenever you use (not …) or delete effects, and never leave an :precondition or :effect block empty—either omit it or include at least one literal.

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

            :action GotoLocation

            :action OpenObject

            :action CloseObject
            :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        4. take an object from another receptacle
            :action PickupObject
            :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        5. put object into/on/in another receptacle
            :action PutObject
            :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        6. using an object/receptacle by turning it on/off with a switch
            :action useObject
            :parameters (?o - object)
        7. heat an object using a receptacle
            :action HeatObject
            :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        8. clean an object using a receptacle
            :action CleanObject
            :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
        9. cool an object using a receptacle
            :action CoolObject
            :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        10. slice an object using a sharp object
            :action SliceObject
            :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)

        You must go to a receptacle first in order to use/open it or take/put objects from/on it.

        The process involves two main stages:

        1. Always searching for the aim Object first!!!
            In this stage, your goal is to go to and may need to open new, unvisited recepatacles until you find the object mentioned in the task. Some receptacles cannot be opened so you can directly see what objects after you go to that receptacle.

            You can only use the GotoLocation action to travel to a new location and the OpenObject action (if the receptacle is closed) to verify whether it contains the target object.

            Goal 1.1: Reach a location that has not been visited (the location should be a receptacle) using the GotoLocation action. 
                You goal should look like this:
                (:goal 
                    (at ?recepatacle)
                ) where recepatacle should be somewhere or some recepatacles not visited.

            Goal 1.2: If you already go to the recepatacle and found the recepatacle is closed, use the OpenObject action to open it and inspect the contents. 
                Your goal should look like this:
                (:goal 
                    (opened ?recepatacle)
                ) where recepatacle should be the recepatacle you want to open.

        2. After you seeing the aim object in any receptacle, using the Object to Complete the Task:
            After you have located the object (the object may have some numbers added), you should always first pick up the object from that receptacle and update your goal to focus on how the object is used to complete the task. Remember your goal is You open the drawer 5. The drawer 5 is open. In it, you see nothing.. Based on different adjectives, you may need to perform different actions for the object in different ways.

            This may involve more than simply transferring it from one place to another.
            For example: You might examine the object or a nearby receptacle to gather information. You may need to use another tool or device (like a lamp or a switch). Some tasks require you to slice, heat, cool, or clean the object using an appropriate receptacle (e.g., microwave, sink, fridge).

            If necessary, use the PickupObject action to retrieve the item, and the GotoLocation action to move to the correct place.
            Then, apply the object in a purposeful way — not just move it — but interact with the environment to fulfill the task’s actual goal.

            Hint: 
            1. If you want to heat, clean, and cool an object, after you go to that aim receptacle, do not put the object in the receptacle but do the action directly. For example, go to fridge, then cool the object with receptacle.
            2. If you want to slice an object, you should first go to the receptacle where both the sharp object and the aim object are located and ONLY pick up the sharp object then do the slice action. Don't forget to put the sharp object back to the receptacle after you finish slicing.
            3. If you want to examine or look at an object with a lamp, you should first go to the receptacle where the object is located and then pick it up and take the USE action of the lamp. You don't need to take the lamp but directly use it.
            4. If there are multiple actions needed to complete the task, you can break them down into smaller subgoals. For example, if you need to slice and then heat an object, first focus on slicing it, and then move on to heating it.

        In summary, the first stage is all about finding the object—this might involve going to an unvisited receptacle and opening it if necessary.
        
        Note: 
        1. some receptacles have numbers in their names. Always keep them as they are. For example, "towelholder1" should not be changed to "towelholder".
        2. Your initial goal should always be to go to a new location instead of put something into somewhere.
        3. Do not enter stage 2 when not finishing stage 1.

        Note: Always include :negative-preconditions in your :requirements whenever you use (not …) or delete effects, and never leave an :precondition or :effect block empty—either omit it or include at least one literal.

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)
