(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

Generated df and pf:
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

Generated df and pf:
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)
(define (problem alfred-problem)
  (:domain alfred)
  (:objects
    alfred - agent
    init_receptacle armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle

            :action PickupObject

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

Based on the df and pf that you generated, the external solver could generate a plan but after simulating in the game environment, it caused those errors: 
In this step, you take the following actions and observations from those actions:
Action: take alfred from keychain 3
Nothing happens.


This is the action you take and got something wrong: take alfred from keychain 3. You are trying to take something from a receptacle. You should first go to this receptacle to take the object. But if you have already go to this receptacle and still seeing this error message, it means that this receptacle doesn't have this object. You should go to other receptacle to find your aim object. Remember do not assume you can take the object from the receptable but should always set the initial goal as finding that aim object.

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

            This may involve more than simply transferring it from one place to another.

Some tasks require you to slice, heat, cool, or clean the object using an appropriate receptacle (e.g., microwave, sink, fridge).

            If necessary, use the PickupObject action to retrieve the item, and the GotoLocation action to move to the correct place.
            Then, apply the object in a purposeful way — not just move it — but interact with the environment to fulfill the task’s actual goal.

            Hint: 
            1. If you want to heat, clean, and cool an object, after you go to that aim receptacle, do not put the object in the receptacle but do the action directly. For example, go to fridge, then cool the object with receptacle.
            2. If you want to slice an object, you should first go to the receptacle where both the sharp object and the aim object are located and ONLY pick up the sharp object then do the slice action. Don't forget to put the sharp object back to the receptacle after you finish slicing.
            3. If you want to examine or look at an object with a lamp, you should first go to the receptacle where the object is located and then pick it up and take the USE action of the lamp. You don't need to take the lamp but directly use it.
            4. If there are multiple actions needed to complete the task, you can break them down into smaller subgoals. For example, if you need to slice and then heat an object, first focus on slicing it, and then move on to heating it.

        In summary, the first stage is all about finding the object—this might involve going to an unvisited receptacle and opening it if necessary.
        
        Note: 
        1. some receptacles have numbers in their names. Always keep them as they are. For example, "towelholder1" should not be changed to "towelholder".
        2. Your initial goal should always be to go to a new location instead of put something into somewhere.
        3. Do not enter stage 2 when not finishing stage 1.

        Note: Always include :negative-preconditions in your :requirements whenever you use (not …) or delete effects, and never leave an :precondition or :effect block empty—either omit it or include at least one literal.

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

This is the action you take and got something wrong: take alfred from keychain 3. You are trying to take something from a receptacle. You should first go to this receptacle to take the object. But if you have already go to this receptacle and still seeing this error message, it means that this receptacle doesn't have this object. You should go to other receptacle to find your aim object. Remember do not assume you can take the object from the receptable but should always set the initial goal as finding that aim object.

Generated df and pf:
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

Generated df and pf:
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)

Generated df and pf:
(define (domain alfred)
 (:requirements
    :adl
    :action-costs
    :typing
    :negative-preconditions
 )
 (:types
  agent
  receptacle
  object
  sharpObject
  rtype
  otype
  )

 (:predicates
    (at ?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (openable ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (checked ?r - receptacle)
    (receptacleType ?r - receptacle ?t - rtype)
    (canContain ?rt - rtype ?ot - otype)
    (objectType ?o - object ?t - otype)
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)
    (isClean ?o - object)
    (cleanable ?o - object)
    (isHot ?o - object)
    (heatable ?o - object)
    (isCool ?o - object)
    (coolable ?o - object)
    (pickupable ?o - object)
    (toggleable ?o - object)
    (isOn ?o - object)
    (isToggled ?o - object)
    (sliceable ?o - object)
    (isSliced ?o - object)
 )

 (:functions
    (total-cost) - number
   )

(:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?from) (not (at ?a ?to)) (not (checked ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?a ?from))
                (at ?a ?to)
                (checked ?to)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (opened ?r)
                (checked ?r)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (openable ?r)
                    (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (opened ?r))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                    (pickupable ?o)
                    (not (holdsAny ?a))
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r)))
    :effect (and (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action PutObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (holds ?a ?o)
                    (at ?a ?r)
                    (or (not (openable ?r)) (opened ?r))
                    (exists (?ot - otype ?rt - rtype) (and (objectType ?o ?ot) (receptacleType ?r ?rt) (canContain ?rt ?ot))))
    :effect (and (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
                (increase (total-cost) 1)
            )
 )

(:action useObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (exists (?r - receptacle) (and (at ?a ?r) (inReceptacle ?o ?r) (toggleable ?o)))
    :effect (and (when (isOn ?o) (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o)) (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (heatable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r MicrowaveType))
    :effect (and (isHot ?o)
                (not (isCool ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (cleanable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r SinkBasinType))
    :effect (and (isClean ?o)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?o)
                    (coolable ?o)
                    (receptacleType ?r FridgeType))
    :effect (and (isCool ?o)
                (not (isHot ?o))
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )

(:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?a ?r)
                    (inReceptacle ?co ?r)
                    (holds ?a ?sharp_o)
                    (sliceable ?co))
    :effect (and (isSliced ?co)
                (increase (total-cost) 5)
            )
 )
)
